_publications._publicationTitle: Early Detection of Malignant and Premalignant Peripheral Nerve Tumors Using Cell-Free DNA Fragmentomics.

_contextSnippet: Indeed, a logistic regression model trained on signature weights inferred from a 20-component NMF model was able to detect tumor signal in six MPNST plasma samples that fell below the tumor fraction detection threshold
details: Logistic regression model trained on 20-component NMF signature weights achieved 91.4% detection rate for MPNST plasma samples using 10 repeats of fivefold cross-validation
